one_line_description: LinkedIn's Marketing/Advertising API for managing sponsored campaigns, audiences, and ad reporting on LinkedIn.
auth_summary: 3-legged OAuth2 (authorization code flow, member authorization) is required for Marketing APIs; you register a LinkedIn developer app and users grant it access. No API-key option.
access_notes: You must create a developer app and apply for the Advertising API product via an access-request form; LinkedIn reviews the use case (typically 2-4 weeks, generic data-collection use cases rejected). Access starts at a Development tier, and a further 'Increasing Access' review is needed for standard/production-scale access.
api_surface_summary: Versioned REST API covering ad accounts, campaign groups, campaigns, creatives, targeting/audiences (Matched Audiences), conversions, lead gen forms, and analytics/reporting.
main_blocker: Advertising API access is gated behind LinkedIn's application review with business justification; no self-serve production credentials
agent_notes: No official LinkedIn MCP found; several community MCPs exist (danielpopamd, CData read-only, Zapier-hosted). The gate is real but not a formal paid partner program — ads-management/reporting use cases reportedly do get approved, so an established integrator like Composio could likely obtain access, just not instantly.
